top_signals.title: Norsepower Rotor Sail: Turning wind into fuel savings for the green shipping transition
top_signals.summary: As shipping moves deeper into the energy transition, wind power is returning to the industry in a new and highly practical form. Modern wind-assisted propulsion is not about going back to traditional sailing. It is about using available wind energy to reduce fuel consumption, lower emissions and support compliance with increasingly demanding environmental regulations. Norsepower, ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The foundations of national sovereignty: the role of central bank money
KPMG chief apologises for treatment of Australian whistleblower
top_signals.summary: Gary Wingrove previously ran Big Four firm’s Australian operation before taking up global role

top_signals.title: MotoGP and manufacturers sign first Formula 1-style Concorde agreement
top_signals.summary: MotoGP and its five manufacturers have today signed a first-of-its-kind partnership that mimics Formula 1’s famous Concorde agreement. The two-wheeled motorsporting discipline, owned by Formula 1 parent Liberty Media, this morning agreed what they have called a “defining” agreement between themselves and the five bike manufacturers – Aprilia, Ducati, Honda, KTM and Yamaha – in [...]
